ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "schoolID" TEXT /* Unique identifier assigned to each university */,
  "name_full" TEXT /* Full name of the university */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the university (Public, Private, etc.) */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL */,
  "president" TEXT /* Name of the current president or chancellor */,
  "motto" TEXT /* University's motto */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the main campus */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the main campus */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status or body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_locations" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the university is situated */,
  "main_campus" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the location is the main campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus if it differs from the main campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id", "location_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier assigned to each university
City where the university is located
State where the university is located
Country where the university is located
Type of the university (Public, Private, etc.)
Name of the current president or chancellor
Geographic latitude of the main campus
Geographic longitude of the main campus
Elevation of the location in meters
ID of the location where the university is situated
Boolean indicating if the location is the main campus
Name of the campus if it differs from the main campus
